svg.text: NAME:
aws-ssm-params export - Export parameter values to stdout
USAGE:
aws-ssm-params [global options] export [command options]
OPTIONS:
--output-field string [ --output-field string ] AWS field to include in export output; repeat for multiple fields [$AWS_SSM_PARAMS_OUTPUT_FIELD]
--map-field string [ --map-field string ] field mapping as aws_field:file_field; repeat for multiple mappings [$AWS_SSM_PARAMS_MAP_FIELD]
--map-path string [ --map-path string ] path mapping as aws_path:file_path; repeat for multiple mappings [$AWS_SSM_PARAMS_MAP_PATH]
--sort-by string [ --sort-by string ] export sort as field:asc or field:desc; repeat for multiple fields; env accepts comma-separated values [$AWS_SSM_PARAMS_SORT_BY]
--with-decryption decrypt SecureString values [$AWS_SSM_PARAMS_WITH_DECRYPTION]
--format string output format: dotenv, json, or yaml (default: "dotenv") [$AWS_SSM_PARAMS_FORMAT]
--key-field string AWS field to use as object/map key for JSON or YAML records [$AWS_SSM_PARAMS_KEY_FIELD]
--scalar write exactly one selected --output-field as scalar values instead of records [$AWS_SSM_PARAMS_SCALAR]
--help, -h show help
GLOBAL OPTIONS:
--region string [ --region string ] AWS region; repeat the flag for multiple regions; env accepts comma-separated values [$AWS_SSM_PARAMS_REGION, $AWS_REGION]
--all-regions search parameters across all enabled AWS regions [$AWS_SSM_PARAMS_ALL_REGIONS]
--profile string AWS profile [$AWS_SSM_PARAMS_PROFILE, $AWS_PROFILE]
--no-color disable colored output [$AWS_SSM_PARAMS_NO_COLOR]
--keymap string keyboard navigation style: emacs or vi (default: "emacs") [$AWS_SSM_PARAMS_KEYMAP]
--log-level string log level: trace, debug, info, warn, error, or off (default: "off") [$AWS_SSM_PARAMS_LOG_LEVEL]
--filter string [ --filter string ] filter group; conditions inside one value are separated by semicolons; env accepts comma-separated values [$AWS_SSM_PARAMS_FILTER]
